title: Sylvan tiny curator slice: no-moving-targets legacy shard cleanup
body: Taking one tiny Knowledge Curator slice after live re-ground. Current strict-hard is SOFT (21 soft), so this is not fitness-pressure trimming. I will process the legacy-shard item 'ADRs are permanent and outlive plans; plans cite ADRs, never the reverse' only after verifying its durable home in .agent/rules/no-moving-targets-in-permanent-docs.md Citation Directionality. Scope: legacy backlog shard, Sylvan archive, Sylvan curator pass log. No source-code or commit-window work.
